REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of 418 Head Street, San Francisco, Ca 94132)
Off Calendar Dec-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Weinkauf, for petitioner San Francisco Public Administrator.

Mr. Weinkauf stated that the proposed sale was for a 100% interest in the real property located at 418 Head Street, San Francisco, California, for the bid amount of $696,000.00, upon the terms and conditions of the report of sale filed with the court on November 12, 2015. There were no overbidders.
The sale was confirmed at $696,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt and review of the order). No additional bond was required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported)
